brief: The total cost for the tokens used.
additional_context: This attribute appears on both agent parent spans (aggregated totals) and LLM child spans (per-call values). When using sum() to calculate total cost, filter to gen_ai.operation.type:ai_client to avoid double-counting hierarchical spans.
Despite the name 'cost.total_tokens', this value is cost in USD, not a token count. For token counts, use gen_ai.usage.total_tokens.
